## Ship checklist
- [ ] Review and edit the draft SKILL.md above
- [ ] Create `wrench-dna/skills/[name]/SKILL.md` with the reviewed content
- [ ] Add to `sync-plugins.sh` (public or internal list)
- [ ] Create `plugins/[name]/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- [ ] Add entry to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- [ ] Run `bash scripts/sync-plugins.sh --push`
- [ ] Cut release — bump minor version in `marketplace.json` + `smithery.yaml`
